label: Attribute Specific
query: A runway model wearing a black hooded coat over a red top and a black skirt.
rationale: Tests colour and garment attributes that are present in the catalog.

label: Contextual/Place
query: A woman in a beige short-sleeve jacket with light-blue trim and a pale yellow knee-length skirt walking on a fashion-show runway.
rationale: Tests clothing together with the dominant catalog context: a runway show.

label: Palm Tree Dress
query: A woman in a lime green dress carrying a white handbag while walking along a palm-lined street.
rationale: Tests color, accessory, and urban outdoor context.

label: Complex Semantic
query: A woman in a fitted brown one-shoulder dress standing outdoors beside a black metal fence.
rationale: Tests the combination of garment shape, colour, pose, and outdoor context.

label: Style Inference
query: A casual edgy runway outfit with a sheer beige sleeveless top and flared blue jeans.
rationale: Tests style language alongside multiple fashion attributes.

label: Compositional
query: A white lace long-sleeve top layered under a blue patterned blouse, with blue plaid pants and a brown beret.
rationale: Tests attribute binding across layered garments, trousers, and an accessory.
